title: Addition of Two Numbers: A Basic Concept
summary: Understanding addition helps us combine quantities and solve everyday problems. It's a fundamental operation in mathematics that is used extensively.

sections.heading: What it Is
sections.body: Addition involves combining two or more numbers to get their total sum, which represents the quantity of items together when counted one by one.

sections.heading: How It Works
sections.body: To perform addition on two numbers, align them vertically if they are in digit form and start adding from the rightmost digits moving leftward. Carry over values when sums exceed nine.

sections.heading: Why It Matters
sections.body: Addition is not just a math skill but also essential for various real-life scenarios like making change, measuring ingredients in cooking or calculating distances.

key_facts: The result of adding two numbers is called the sum.
